title: Pride Update
description: A mod that adds pride flags to the game!
body:
![Minecraft Pride Update Title / Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/904bb3a0a2f87e36fe60db5d46b1cff824fde8b1.png)

## Show your Pride !
This mod adds several pride flags to the game such as:

- Pride
- Progress
- Lesbian
- Gay
- Bisexual
- Transgender
- Intersex
- Aromantic
- Asexual
- Genderfluid
- Nonbinary
- Pansexual
- Polyamory

![Every Pride Flag added to the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d27b8a5cc8c4a2ef19ef2fd343a36e8f4d14738.jpeg)

## How to get the flags

Flags and patterns **can be found in villagers chest** or **via trading with the shepherd, librarian or the wandering merchant.**

You need to craft pattern using paper and appropriate dyes first, to then craft flags.
Here is an example with the trans flag:

![Crafting recipe for trans pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc0904edfa21823cb69c17532ff550cb10279915.png)
![Crafting recipe for transgender flag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8894fa860b8b9f61af24ae1ab493970f75a1a9.png)
